name: Shop: Loyalty Reminder

description.en: Check for customers who haven't visited recently and send them a reminder.
description.de: Prüfe auf Kunden, die kürzlich nicht da waren, und sende eine Erinnerung.

bot: This is a scheduled warp that runs daily. Query the smart contract for stale customers using getStaleCustomers with a timestamp threshold (current time minus the shop's configured reminder_days). For each stale customer, look up their JoAi contact by name or card ID tag, then send a WhatsApp/SMS reminder via Twilio. Log each reminder as a contact activity.

messages.bot: Calculate STALE_SINCE as: current unix timestamp minus (reminder_days * 86400). The reminder_days value should come from the shop's loyalty config (getLoyaltyConfig). For each stale customer in the result, resolve their contact and send a reminder message.
